title: Velway 12 Pairs Safety Work Gloves - Firm Grip Gardening Gloves Non-Slip PU Coated Lightweight Breathable Protective Mechanic Builders Working Gloves Men Women for General Duty Work Red (Size 10/XL)
features: DIMENSIONS: 12 pairs Safety Working Gloves size XL / 10. Measurements of glove length is 26 cm. The palm width is 10 cm. Note: Order the next size up for the best fit possible.

BREATHABLE: The seamless knitted liner is ergonomically designed to fit snugly but not tightly. Made from breathable polyester that helps reduce heat build-up, ensuring that the gloves remain comfortable even after extended wear.

NON-SLIP: The gloves are coated with a PU layer on the palm and fingertips, which offers firm grip and durability. Whether you're working indoors or outdoors, these work gloves offer comfortable and reliable protection for your hands.

COMFORTABLE: Our workwear gloves are elasticized at the wrist, which is stretchy and comfortable to wear, making the gloves highly dexterous and non-slip. The knitted cuff is not easy to come unstitched, extending the glove's working life.

MULTIPLE USES: Ideal for general light to medium duty work, such as Assembly, Auto Repairing, Gardening, DIY, Warehouse, Construction, Home improvement and so on. With a pack of 12 pairs, these gloves offer exceptional value and long-lasting performance, suitable for both men and women.
